title: A Small Neural Network in PyTorch
short_description: Build a 2-layer MLP and verify it works via forward-pass shape, gradient flow, and a short loss decrease -- no GPU, no training to convergence.
learning_objectives: Subclass nn.Module and define layers + forward
Use nn.Linear and nn.ReLU and understand why non-linearity is needed
Verify a model via forward-pass shape/finiteness and gradient flow
Write a training loop: zero_grad, backward, step
Use BCEWithLogitsLoss and an Adam optimizer
